Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} \begin{longtable}[t]{lrrrrl} \caption{\label{tab:table-of-findings-before}Table of alpha diversity comparisons before Treatment}\\ \toprule \textbf{group1} & \textbf{group2} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.adj}\\ \midrule \endfirsthead \caption[]{Table of alpha diversity comparisons before Treatment \textit{(continued)}}\\ \toprule \textbf{group1} & \textbf{group2} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.adj}\\ \midrule \endhead \endfoot \bottomrule \endlastfoot rice & oat & 4 & 4 & -0.02 & 0.373\\* \end{longtable} ::: ::: ##### After treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} \begin{longtable}[t]{lrrrrl} \caption{\label{tab:table-of-findings-after}Table of alpha diversity comparisons after Treatment}\\ \toprule \textbf{group1} & \textbf{group2} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.adj}\\ \midrule \endfirsthead \caption[]{Table of alpha diversity comparisons after Treatment \textit{(continued)}}\\ \toprule \textbf{group1} & \textbf{group2} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.adj}\\ \midrule \endhead \endfoot \bottomrule \endlastfoot rice & oat & 4.1 & 3.9 & -0.06 & 0.048\\* \end{longtable} ::: ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_shannon_files/figure-pdf/viz-div_change-1.pdf){fig-align='center'} ::: ::: #### Within-group ##### Paired treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **paired Wilcoxon** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} \begin{longtable}[t]{lrrrrl} \caption{\label{tab:table-of-findings-paired}Table of alpha diversity paired between timepoint(1 and 2)}\\ \toprule \textbf{diet} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.value} & \textbf{y.position}\\ \midrule \endfirsthead \caption[]{Table of alpha diversity paired between timepoint(1 and 2) \textit{(continued)}}\\ \toprule \textbf{diet} & \textbf{mean1} & \textbf{mean2} & \textbf{log2FC} & \textbf{p.value} & \textbf{y.position}\\ \midrule \endhead \endfoot \bottomrule \endlastfoot rice & 4 & 4.1 & 0.03 & 0.078 & 5.043\\ oat & 4 & 3.9 & -0.02 & 0.137 & 5.243\\* \end{longtable} ::: ::: ### LMM ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: -
